subject: AAI-1468 Add connectivity schema for CCVPN usecase
commit_message:
AAI-1468 Add connectivity schema for CCVPN usecase

Issue-ID: AAI-1468
Add connectivities sub-component to "network" namespace.
Add connectivities element, which is sequence of "connectivity".
Add connectivity element, which has numerous properties.
Make the following properties indexed and searchable:
connectivity-id, etht-svc-name, operational-status

Change-Id: I4cd5199b68df21fec8f7804aeb3c98f24268a2ab
Signed-off-by: Keong Lim <keong.lim@huawei.com>

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

Keong, the problem isn't with the private edge unit tests. Its that the java-attribute has to be camel case. The unit tests use the schema and tries to create the schema and it failed during that phase and the first junit that failed with it was the private edge. You have cir, eir, ebs, cbs as uppercase for the java attribute which you cannot do.

Patch Set 3:

Thanks Harish, I will rename the java attributes to use camelCase.
Shouldn't this be detected as part of the schema generation phase, rather than the unit test phase?
The command given was using "-DskipTests" so this never showed up before. Also, in the near future, the AAI schema will be dynamically modified at run-time, so how will that scenario detect these errors?

Patch Set 3:

Also, where in the error logs did you diagnose this particular problem? it was not obvious to me from what I could see. It only complained that the Helper could not be found and all that does is instantiate a graph object.

Can the error messages be improved? It is giving false negatives on too many unrelated test cases.
Uploaded patch set 4.
